h1: font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(30, 30, 30); margin: 0.6em 8px; line-height: 1.4;
h2: font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(30, 30, 30); margin: 0.6em 8px; line-height: 1.5;
h3: font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(30, 30, 30); margin: 0.5em 8px; line-height: 1.5;
h4: font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(63, 63, 63); margin: 0.4em 8px; line-height: 1.5;
h5: font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(63, 63, 63); margin: 0.4em 8px; line-height: 1.5;
h6: font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(63, 63, 63); margin: 0.4em 8px; line-height: 1.5;
p: margin: 0px 8px 2em; padding: 0px; color: rgb(63, 63, 63); font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 2px; line-height: 1.75;
a: color: rgb(0, 128, 255); text-decoration: underline; font-weight: bold;
img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 9px; box-shadow: rgb(180, 180, 180) 0px 0px 0.5em 0px; display: block; margin: 1.5em auto;
code: font-family: Menlo, Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 13px; background-color: rgba(27, 31, 35, 0.05); padding: 0.2em 0.4em; border-radius: 3px; color: rgb(215, 58, 73);
pre: margin: 0px 8px 10px; background: rgb(13, 17, 23); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0px; font-size: 14px; overflow-x: auto;
blockquote: margin: 1em 8px; padding: 0.8em 1em; border-left: 4px solid rgb(220, 220, 220); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); color: rgb(99, 99, 99);
li: margin: 0.5em 0; color: rgb(63, 63, 63); font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 2px; line-height: 1.75;
table: margin: 1em 8px; border-collapse: collapse; width: calc(100% - 16px); font-size: 14px;
th: padding: 0.6em 1em; border: 1px solid rgb(229, 229, 229); font-weight: bold; background-color: rgb(248, 248, 248); color: rgb(30, 30, 30);
td: padding: 0.6em 1em; border: 1px solid rgb(229, 229, 229); color: rgb(63, 63, 63);
hr: border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0 0; border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin: 1em 0;
